## 🤖 Agents

```
skills/
├── notes/      🎛️  Orchestrator (single entry point)
├── capture/    📥 Quick brain dump
├── sort/       🗂️  Routes inbox into hierarchy
├── connect/    🔗 Finds cross-links
├── distill/    💎 Compresses long notes
├── recall/     🧠 Quizzes you on your notes
├── map/        🗺️  Regenerates this file
└── evolve/     🌱 Learns your preferences
```

## 🗄️ Archive

```
archive/   [empty — fills as /sort, /distill, /recall run]
```

## ⚡ Suggested next actions

1. 📥 **Watch Module 1** (Coursera) and `/notes capture` 5-10 thoughts as you watch
2. 🗂️ **Run `/notes sort`** to route the inbox into module 1's NOTES.md
3. 🧠 **Run `/notes recall`** the next day to test what stuck
4. 🌱 **Run `/notes evolve`** after a week to see what the system learned about you
